rule-double-entry-must-balance.description: Sum of debits must equal sum of credits in every journal entry

rule-post-requires-balanced-entry.description: A journal entry can only be posted when it is balanced

rule-posted-entry-immutable.description: Posted entries cannot be edited — only reversed via a counter-entry

rule-invoice-due-after-issue.description: Invoice due date must be on or after issue date

rule-payment-cannot-exceed-invoice.description: Total payments allocated to an invoice cannot exceed its amount

rule-closed-period-no-posting.description: Journal entries cannot be posted to a closed fiscal period

rule-analytic-account-required-for-posti.description: Only analytic accounts (IsAnalytic=true) can receive journal line postings

rule-overdue-invoice-alert.description: Invoices past due date with unpaid balance trigger overdue status

rule-bank-reconciliation-tolerance.description: Reconciliation difference within tolerance is auto-approved; above tolerance requires manual review
